name: HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups using BambooHR for onboarding tool
description: For HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups using BambooHR processing 5–15 new hires/month, inefficient onboarding causes delayed integration. We provide an onboarding checklist generator instead of manual onboarding checklists and spreadsheets.
target_audience: HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups using BambooHR for onboarding
problem_solved: Inefficient onboarding processes leading to delayed integration of new hires.

locked_fields.primary_user: HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups using BambooHR for onboarding
locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient onboarding processes leading to delayed integration of new hires.
